title: lindernia cambodgiana
intro: Lindernia cambodgiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae. This plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Southeast Asian medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lindernia cambodgiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds due to its antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Lindernia cambodgiana is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat various health conditions.
